testsuite.name: com.factory.capturemasterpro.billing.BillingManagerTest

testcase.name: getFormattedPrice returns null when no product details
startConnection changes state to CONNECTED on success
startConnection does nothing when already connected
launchPurchaseFlow sets error when product not available
startConnection changes state to DISCONNECTED on failure
